ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "parent_device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent device (for hierarchical organization) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the register belongs to */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the register (e.g., 0 for base level) */,
  "reg_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register type */,
  "reg_addr" INTEGER /* Address of the register */,
  "reg_mask" INTEGER /* Mask value for the register */,
  "reg_value" INTEGER /* Current value of the register */,
  "default_value" INTEGER /* Default value of the register */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum allowed value of the register */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed value of the register */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_reg_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("reg_type_id") REFERENCES register_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register that was changed */,
  "old_value" INTEGER /* Old value of the register before the change */,
  "new_value" INTEGER /* New value of the register after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_history_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the register type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the device group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_group_members" (
  "group_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group membership */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES device_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_group_members_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., configuration, status change) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type the configuration is for */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "config_data" TEXT /* JSON data representing the configuration settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configuration_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configuration_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_register_configuration" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register */,
  "configured_value" INTEGER /* Configured value of the register */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "device_id", "register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register */,
  "old_value" INTEGER /* Old value of the register before the change */,
  "new_value" INTEGER /* New value of the register after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
